narrative:
Twin  Twp township has 2,943 registered voters, with 48.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.5 percentage points.
